metadata.title: Infinex — AI Transformation & Augmented Engineering
metadata.description: Infinex is your AI transformation partner. Strategy, augmented engineering, measurable results. Become AI-native with a clear strategy and concrete results.

hero.title: Infinite growth.
hero.subtitle: Your AI transformation partner.
hero.description: We partner with ambitious companies on their AI transformation journey. A tailored strategy, agile execution, and results you can measure.

strategy.title: AI Strategy
strategy.description: Process audit, identification of automatable tasks, custom AI roadmap. A concrete action plan, ready to deploy.

transformation.title: AI Transformation
transformation.description: AI solution implementation, team training, change management. We deploy together, and measure results at every step.

engineering.title: AI Engineering
engineering.description: AI-augmented engineering team. You pay for features delivered, not hours spent.

useCases.title: What we actually do
useCases.subtitle: AI solutions that transform your day-to-day.

items.title: Process automation
items.description: We identify your repetitive tasks and automate them with AI. Fewer errors, more speed, your teams focus on what matters.

items.title: Generative AI
items.description: Content generation, document synthesis, conversational assistants — we deploy generative AI where it has real business impact.

items.title: Predictive AI
items.description: Anticipate demand, detect anomalies, optimize decisions. We turn your data into a concrete growth lever.

items.title: Custom business tools
items.description: We design and build AI-augmented internal tools, perfectly tailored to your processes and your business.

items.title: AI training for your teams
items.description: We train your teams to use AI daily. 100% hands-on workshops with tools they'll use the very next day.

items.title: AI Agents
items.description: We build autonomous agents that handle complex tasks for you: research, analysis, lead qualification, customer support, and much more.

whyNow.title: Why now is the right time
whyNow.paragraph1: AI has never been this accessible and powerful.
whyNow.paragraph2: The tools are mature, costs are dropping, and you can see initial results within weeks. It's the perfect time to lay the foundations of your transformation.
whyNow.paragraph3: Every company moves at its own pace. But those who start today build a lasting advantage, step by step.
whyNow.highlight: The best time to start is now.

items.quote: Infinex transformed the way we work in 3 months. 4x ROI on the first project.
items.author: Jeremy CTO

items.quote: Clear communication, concrete and measurable results. Exactly what we were looking for.
items.author: Xavier CEO

items.quote: Infinex's AI engineering team delivers in 2 weeks what used to take us 6 months.
items.author: Gabriel, CEO

items.question: How is Infinex different from a traditional consulting firm?
items.answer: Our approach is centered on action and results. We quickly identify opportunities, implement solutions, and measure ROI at every step. You get a concrete action plan within the first few weeks.

items.question: What does 'AI transformation' mean?
items.answer: Identify your bottlenecks, build tailored AI solutions, train your teams, measure results. Rinse and repeat. The goal: make you AI-native, not AI-dependent.

items.question: What type of companies do you work with?
items.answer: Mature companies (>$100K annual revenue) motivated to become AI-native but lacking the internal resources or expertise to do it alone.

items.question: How does AI engineering work?
items.answer: We have a team of AI-augmented engineers. You pay for features delivered, not hours. We integrate AI into every stage of development to deliver faster and better.

finalCta.title: Let's build your future, together.
finalCta.subtitle: We think long term. Our goal: a transformation that carries you forward for years to come.

transformation.metaDescription: Become AI-native with Infinex. Strategy, implementation, training — for measurable results and rapid impact.

hero.title: From AI-absent to AI-native.

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Discover the vision, mission and values of Infinex — your AI transformation partner.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.description: A world where every company fully leverages AI's potential. Not as a gimmick, but as a fundamental strategic advantage.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Accelerate AI transformation for ambitious companies with a pragmatic, action-oriented approach that delivers concrete results.

items.title: Action first
items.description: Every project starts with a concrete action plan, with measurable results at every step.

items.title: Radical transparency
items.description: Clear and honest communication. We share what works, what can be improved, and why.

items.title: Speed of iteration
items.description: We move fast, test, learn, and adapt. Agility is in our DNA.

items.title: Long-term partnership
items.description: We build lasting partnerships that transform your company for the long term.
